name: Pursuant to Subsection (c) of Subsection (c) of Subsection (c)
text:
Whereas, pursuant to this ordinance, the reader shall refer to subsection (c). Subsection (c) reads: "refer to subsection (c)." Repeat this step. There is no end to this step.
Notwithstanding the foregoing, and the foregoing's foregoing, all things at the table are hereby deemed compliant, noncompliant, and exempt, simultaneously, as both players, at once.
The regulation regulates itself into being. It is become law. The law do be looping.
